description: Offshore U.S. dollar funding monitor — 7 layers (US money-market core, bank funding, credit, central-bank swap-line backstops, settlement fails, FX strain, country hubs) graded green/yellow/red → composite plumbing-health 0-100 + GLM functioning/strained/seizing verdict & short-term lean. Output data/eurodollar-plumbing.json.
